jobs.title: Combined Graduate Level Examination (CGL) 2026
jobs.summary: Recruitment for 12,256 Group B and Group C posts in various Central Government Ministries, Departments, Constitutional Bodies, Statutory Bodies, and Tribunals. Posts include Assistant Section Officer, Assistant Audit Officer, Income Tax Inspector, and more. Eligibility requires a Bachelor's degree in any discipline.
jobs.fitLabel: Accepts any engineering bachelor's degree for management/administrative roles.

jobs.title: Experienced Professionals on Fixed Term Basis
jobs.summary: NTPC recruited experienced professionals on Fixed Term Basis (Advt. 08/26). Online applications were open from 12-06-2026 to 26-06-2026. Candidates were advised to keep documents ready for upload.

jobs.title: Scientist 'B' (Advt. No. 157)
jobs.summary: Direct recruitment for Scientist 'B' posts in DRDO and other Ministry of Defence establishments. Vacancies across various engineering and science disciplines. Selection typically involves a written test and interview. B.Tech Mechanical is often eligible for specific roles.

jobs.title: Rajasthan Administrative Services and other posts (RAS/RTS Combined Competitive Exam)
jobs.summary: Notification released for 607 vacancies (192 State Services, 415 Subordinate Services) requiring a graduation degree.

jobs.title: Project Engineer-I — B.E./B.Tech + 2 yrs experience
jobs.summary: Nine posts across nine cities; accepted B.E./B.Tech with two years' experience. Discipline clause varied by location — some posts took any engineering stream. Closed 4 Jul.

jobs.title: Probationary Officers
jobs.summary: Recruitment for Probationary Officers. Application window was from 18.06.2026 to 08.07.2026. Any engineering bachelor's degree is typically eligible.

jobs.title: Project Engineer Chemical Recruitment 2026
jobs.summary: Recruitment for Project Engineer in Chemical discipline.
jobs.fitLabel: Core engineering role, Mechanical B.Tech eligible for some engineering posts.

jobs.title: Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment
jobs.summary: URSC, Bengaluru invites online applications for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) positions. The application window is from June 12, 2026, to July 11, 2026. Eligibility typically requires a Master's degree or B.Tech with strong academic record.

jobs.title: Computer Assistant (UPPSC) Exam-2025
jobs.summary: Computer Assistant (UPPSC) Exam-2025. An IT role requiring specific technical qualifications. Candidate's Mechanical Engineering degree likely makes this role degree-gated. Application details available.

jobs.title: Sr. Assistant Officer (Fixed Tenure Basis) for Panchkula Unit
jobs.summary: Recruitment for Senior Assistant Officer on a fixed tenure basis for the Panchkula Unit.
jobs.fitLabel: Management role, accepts any degree, which the candidate has.

jobs.title: Group C posts (Clerk-Typist, Tax Assistant, Assistant Motor Vehicle Inspector, Industry Inspector, Technical Assistant)
jobs.summary: Notification released for 2619 vacancies for various Group C posts.
jobs.fitLabel: Group C posts, some may be administrative/technical, general graduation accepted for some roles.

jobs.title: Specialist Cadre Officer — Database & Cloud DBA (Contract)
jobs.summary: DBA and Cloud DBA roles under the SCO stream, extended to 18 Jul 2026. Typically requires an engineering degree in CS/IT plus specific database experience — verify the degree clause in the advert before applying.

jobs.title: Specialist Cadre Officer (DBA, Advisor, CDBA)
jobs.summary: Engagement of Specialist Cadre Officers on contract basis for posts like DBA (Navy), Advisor (CAPF), and CDBA. Online registration extended till 18.07.2026.

jobs.title: Specialist Officer Scale-I — incl. IT Officer
jobs.summary: 745 Specialist Officer posts; window 1–21 Jul 2026. The IT Officer stream requires a 4-year degree in CS/IT/Electronics — a Mechanical B.Tech is normally not eligible despite software experience. Read the fine print before paying the fee.

jobs.title: CRP PO/MT-XVI Probationary Officer / Management Trainee
jobs.summary: Recruitment of Probationary Officers / Management Trainees in 11 Participating Public Sector Banks for 6715 vacancies.
jobs.fitLabel: Any engineering bachelor's degree is eligible for this management role.

jobs.title: CRP SPL-XVI Specialist Officer (IT Officer)
jobs.summary: Recruitment of Specialist Officers, including IT Officer (Scale I), in 11 Participating Public Sector Banks for 301 IT Officer vacancies out of a total of 745 Specialist Officer vacancies.
jobs.fitLabel: Requires CS/IT/Electronics degree, which candidate with B.Tech Mechanical does not have.

jobs.title: Executive Director
jobs.summary: Applications are open for the senior management post of Executive Director at SEBI. This role is for experienced professionals in regulatory/financial domains. While a management role, the candidate's 2-3 years of experience is likely insufficient for this senior position.

jobs.title: Technician Grade 1 (Signal) and Technician Grade 3
jobs.summary: Recruitment for 6,557 Technician Grade 1 (Signal) and Technician Grade 3 posts across multiple Indian Railway zones.
jobs.fitLabel: Core engineering post where Mechanical is eligible.

jobs.title: Technician Apprentice - Mechanical (Haldia Refinery)
jobs.summary: Engagement of Technician Apprentice in Mechanical discipline at Haldia Refinery.
jobs.fitLabel: Core mechanical engineering apprenticeship, candidate has B.Tech Mechanical.

jobs.title: Trade Apprentice - Data Entry Operator (Fresher) (Haldia Refinery)
jobs.summary: Engagement of Trade Apprentice as Data Entry Operator (Fresher) at Haldia Refinery.
jobs.fitLabel: IT/admin role, accepts 12th Pass, candidate has B.Tech.

jobs.title: Direct Recruitment — Advt No. 08/2026
jobs.summary: 48 vacancies across 13 posts in five ministries, including scientist and lab-specialist roles; released 10 Jul, applications open 11–31 Jul 2026 (18:00 IST) on the ORA portal. Most posts are discipline-specific — check post-wise eligibility.

jobs.title: Young Professionals Recruitment 2026 (Rourkela Steel Plant)
jobs.summary: Recruitment of Young Professionals for Rourkela Steel Plant.
jobs.fitLabel: Likely engineering/management role, assuming engineering graduates are eligible.

jobs.title: Combined State / Upper Subordinate Services (PCS) (General/Special Recruitment) Examination-2026
jobs.summary: This is the PCS exam, a general management role, open to any graduate. Selection typically involves Prelims, Mains, and Interview. Strong fit for management roles.

jobs.title: Auditor, Assistant Audit Officer, Assistant Director (Audit), Deputy Director (Audit)
jobs.summary: Recruitment for 74 audit posts for employees of EPFO/Central/State Government with graduation (preferably B.Com), audit/accounts experience.
jobs.fitLabel: Management/Audit role, general graduation accepted, but preference for Commerce/Audit background. Not core mechanical.

jobs.title: Enforcement Officer/Accounts Officer (EO/AO) and Assistant Provident Fund Commissioner (APFC)
jobs.summary: Notification for 156 Enforcement Officer/Accounts Officer (EO/AO) and 76 Assistant Provident Fund Commissioner (APFC) vacancies.
jobs.fitLabel: General management/administrative roles, typically open to any graduate.

jobs.title: Grade A — Assistant Manager (RDBS / Generalist)
jobs.summary: Notification expected Jul–Aug 2026 with ~80–100 posts; registration usually runs 15–20 days. Generalist stream accepts any bachelor's with 60% — a prime management-track match for this profile.

jobs.title: Assistant Manager (Grade A)
jobs.summary: Official notification expected soon (July-August 2026) for Assistant Manager posts in various streams (General, Finance & Accounts, Information Technology, Legal, Research, Official Language) with an estimated 20-30 vacancies. Bachelor's Degree in Engineering is an eligibility.
jobs.fitLabel: Strong for General Stream (any engineering bachelor's). Gated for IT stream (requires CS/IT/Electronics degree).

jobs.title: Junior Engineer (JE) — 4,098 approved vacancies
jobs.summary: Fresh CEN for JE / DMS / CMA posts approved across 35 categories; window expected Jul–Aug 2026. Mechanical B.Tech fully eligible — core-engineering track, so a fallback rather than a target for this profile.

jobs.title: Junior Engineer (JE) Examination 2026
jobs.summary: Recruitment for Junior Engineer posts in Civil, Mechanical, and Electrical streams in various government organizations. The official notification is expected to be released in July 2026.
jobs.fitLabel: Core engineering post where Mechanical Engineering is eligible.

jobs.title: Recruitment for Technician 'B', Technical Assistant, Scientific Assistant & others
jobs.summary: ISRO ISTRAC invites applications for various technical and support posts including Technician 'B', Technical Assistant, Scientific Assistant, Draughtsman 'B', Library Assistant 'A', and Cook 'A'. Eligibility varies by post.

jobs.title: Recruitment for Research Associate (RA-I)
jobs.summary: SDSC SHAR invites applications for Research Associate (RA-I) positions. Eligibility typically requires a Master's or PhD, or B.Tech with relevant research experience. Check detailed advertisement for specific requirements.

jobs.title: Lateral Recruitment of Site Engineers
jobs.summary: Lateral recruitment for Site Engineers on full-time contract basis in RBI. This is a core engineering role, not aligned with the candidate's software engineering background or interest in management/IT.

jobs.title: Engagement of Young Professionals
jobs.summary: Engagement of Young Professionals in Reserve Bank of India. This is a generalist/management role, a strong fit for the candidate's interest and background.

jobs.title: Accounts Officer
jobs.summary: Recruitment for 32 Accounts Officer posts in the Administration of Union Territory of Ladakh. This is a management/finance role, typically open to any graduate. Application window recently extended/reopened.

jobs.title: Administrative Officer Grade - I
jobs.summary: Recruitment for 8 Administrative Officer Grade-I posts in the Ministry of Defence. This is a general management role, typically open to any graduate. An addendum notice was recently published.

jobs.title: Junior Engineer (JE), Depot Material Superintendent (DMS), Chemical & Metallurgical Assistant (CMA)
jobs.summary: Upcoming recruitment for 4,098 Junior Engineer, Depot Material Superintendent, and Chemical & Metallurgical Assistant posts.
jobs.fitLabel: Core engineering post where Mechanical is eligible.

jobs.title: CRP CSA-XVI Customer Service Associate (Clerk)
jobs.summary: Upcoming recruitment of Customer Service Associates (Clerk) in Participating Public Sector Banks.
jobs.fitLabel: Any engineering bachelor's degree is eligible for this management role.

jobs.title: Engineer Trainee
jobs.summary: Recruitment of Engineer Trainees in various engineering disciplines.
jobs.fitLabel: Core engineering role, Mechanical B.Tech eligible.

jobs.title: Graduate Trainee (Programming Officer)
jobs.summary: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Limited (ONGC) has released a short notification for Graduate Trainee (E1 Level) posts, including Programming Officer. Requires an Engineering Degree in a relevant discipline. Selection will be based on GATE 2026 score, qualification, and interview.
jobs.fitLabel: IT role, likely requiring a CS/IT/Electronics degree, which the candidate does not possess.

jobs.title: Assistant Administrative Officer (AAO)
jobs.summary: Notification expected in August 2026 for Assistant Administrative Officer posts across Generalist and Specialist streams.
jobs.fitLabel: Strong for Generalist stream (any graduate). Moderate for specialist streams if Mechanical is eligible.

jobs.title: Graduate Trainee (E1 Level) - Engineering Disciplines
jobs.summary: Recruitment of Graduate Trainees at E1 Level in various Engineering disciplines.
jobs.fitLabel: Core engineering role, Mechanical B.Tech eligible.

jobs.title: Management Trainee (Mechanical)
jobs.summary: PSU management-trainee intake at HAL for Mechanical engineering graduates - a management-track role where a Mechanical B.Tech is squarely eligible. Applications close 31 Aug 2026; verify details on HAL careers.

jobs.title: Management Trainee (Computer Science)
jobs.summary: HAL management-trainee stream for Computer Science graduates; closes 31 Aug 2026. Degree-gated to CS - listed for completeness.
